name: Rahim Khan
bio: Childhood friend from Sarankhola school. We used to cycle to the river together and still share stories about village life.

name: Priya Das
bio: Met at Dhaka University. We studied together, shared hostel memories, and bonded over Bengali literature and adda sessions.

name: Arjun Sharma
bio: Former colleague from an IT project in Dhaka. We often discuss tech trends and dream of starting a startup together.

name: Jaya Ahsan
bio: Known since childhood family gatherings in Khulna. She feels like an elder sister — we talk about life, marriage, and family recipes.

name: Sohail Ahmed
bio: University friend from BUET. We played cricket on the field and still argue about Bangladesh vs India matches.

name: Mehazabien Chowdhury
bio: Met during a group trip to Cox's Bazar. We love exploring new places and sharing travel photos and stories.

name: Nihal Khan
bio: Local friend from the same area in Khulna. We go to the gym together and motivate each other to stay fit.

name: Purnima
bio: Connected through a book reading group. We discuss Bengali and Indian novels and occasionally meet in Dhaka.

name: Shakib Rahman
bio: Best friend since high school in Barisal. We share everything — from career struggles to family joys.

name: Sadia Islam
bio: College roommate in Dhaka. We survived exam nights with endless gossip about classmates.
